title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 4 - 2017: Conquering Ancient Western Classics Bigly

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief late-night vlog update from Boulder on June 4, 2017. He spent the day working on organizing his classics books and website, listening to a large Roman history audiobook/text, and bought discounted drinks, frozen food, and candy from a closing supermarket. He mentions being slightly high and is looking forward to wrapping up his classics project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: nearing completion and excited to finish
finds it very good and rewatchable/re-readable
opportunistic — might as well stock up while it's discounted
frustrated by limitations of his platform, working around it by grouping links on one page

claims.claim: I'm not going to use the green screen today because I don't have time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's 9:56 pm, and I have work tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up at around 1:30 pm today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I slept for about 6, 7, or 8 hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked all day on my book, 'Classics.'

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm nearing the end of working on my book.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have a lot of touch-ups and revisions left to do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can finish the book in a couple of weeks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Finishing the book will motivate me to do other things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been listening to 'The Romans and His Dream Room.'

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've listened to interesting parts of the book repeatedly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The book is 3,200 pages long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The book is already on my website's education page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought hard drinks because they were 25% off at the supermarket.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought frozen food and candy.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm excited to see what I can accomplish tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to link items to my website page for organization.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can't do batch edits on Dreamweaver anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to group links on one page to make them visible.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can use batch edits for other purposes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm kind of high right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't get extra high while making this video.
